title: Spare Planks
description: A lightweight "sticks to planks" mod for non-tree punchers.
body:
This mod exists to compliment mods that disallow punching trees with your hands.

Sticks can be made into their own planks, with their own set of block types.
Their main purpose is to be used for recipes that use any type of wood.

No flint tools, no weird loot table shenanigains, no headache necessary.

You are allowed to use this project in a modpack if you'd like.
